results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 - Advisor Perspectives
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Al Jazeera
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement

results.summary: FOMC voted 8-4 to hold rates at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026. Unusual four dissents - 3 wanted to remove reference to future cut, 1 (Miran, Trump appointee) wanted immediate cut. Elevated inflation partly from energy prices. Powell signaled he will remain on Board of Governors indefinitely.
